testcase.name: trackEvent is called when submitClick is called

failure.message: Wanted but not invoked: analyticsClient.track(<any string>); -> at ViewModelTest.trackEvent is called when submitClick is called(ViewModelTest.kt:14) Actually, there were zero interactions with this mock.
